scripts.build:ios: npm run release:check && eas build --platform ios
scripts.build:android: npm run release:check:android && eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.build:local:ios: npm run release:check && EXPO_NO_CAPABILITY_SYNC=1 DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer LANG=en_US.UTF-8 npx eas-cli build --local --platform ios --profile production --non-interactive --output build/ios-local.ipa
scripts.build:local:sim: DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer LANG=en_US.UTF-8 npx eas-cli build --local --platform ios --profile simulator --non-interactive --output build/ios-sim-local.tar.gz
scripts.build:local:android: npm run release:check:android && ANDROID_HOME=/Users/bpollak/Library/Android/sdk JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@17/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home LANG=en_US.UTF-8 NODE_ENV=production EAS_SKIP_AUTO_FINGERPRINT=1 npx eas-cli build --local --platform android --profile production --non-interactive --output build/android-local.aab
scripts.build:local:android:preview: ANDROID_HOME=/Users/bpollak/Library/Android/sdk JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@17/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home LANG=en_US.UTF-8 NODE_ENV=production EAS_SKIP_AUTO_FINGERPRINT=1 npx eas-cli build --local --platform android --profile preview --non-interactive --output build/android-preview.apk
scripts.submit:ios: npm run release:check && eas submit --platform ios && npm run release:mark-submitted
scripts.submit:local:ios: npm run release:check && npx eas-cli submit --platform ios --path build/ios-local.ipa --non-interactive && npm run release:mark-submitted
scripts.submit:android:internal: npx eas-cli submit --platform android --profile internal --path build/android-local.aab --non-interactive
scripts.submit:android:closed: npx eas-cli submit --platform android --profile closed --path build/android-local.aab --non-interactive
scripts.submit:android: npx eas-cli submit --platform android --profile production --path build/android-local.aab --non-interactive
